calendar.hook: Three years on the same vessel.
calendar.rationale: Safe recovery test — proven shape, proven hook. Highest-engagement post in our history (1,054 imp) re-run.
Site flagship USP. Chains thematically from Post 1.

calendar.hook: Ask not what features it has.
calendar.rationale: Plants the Cross-Domain Chain flag. The James-Clear-naming-Atomic-Habits move.

calendar.hook: Over 60% of chief stewardesses on 60m+ yachts now rotate every 2–3 months.
calendar.rationale: Breaks carousel cadence. Expands ICP beyond CE to OWN/FM/CS.
Closes the recovery window. Introduces SRV audience + verifier.celeste7.ai.

checkpoints.label: Day 7 recovery check
checkpoints.action: Capture EQS of posts 1-2. If 60-min impressions back to ≥5% of follower count, throttle releasing — continue to week 2.

checkpoints.label: Day 14 phase gate
checkpoints.action: EQS median across all 5 posts. If ≥30% of follower count at 24h sustained, advance to Phase 2 (Ramp · 4 posts/week).

checkpoints.label: Day 30 ramp gate
checkpoints.action: If EQS median holds at baseline+, advance to Phase 3 (Daily). Otherwise hold at Phase 2 cadence.

next_brief_due: 2026-05-18 (Sunday 18:00 UTC) — week 2 brief generated from bank, excluding the first 5 IDs
